category_sources: Official Apache ZooKeeper docs describe it as a high-performance coordination service for distributed applications.
source_facts.description: Centralized server for distributed coordination of services.
display_name_sources: Official Apache project and GitHub repository use Apache ZooKeeper.
source_facts.homepage is the Apache ZooKeeper site.
docs_sources: Official Apache ZooKeeper documentation page contains current overview, getting started, API docs, programmer guide, admin guide, CLI, and tools docs.
repo_sources: Official Apache GitHub repository is apache/zookeeper and its README points to zookeeper.apache.org as the project website.
tags_sources: Official docs list naming, configuration management, synchronization, group services, consensus, leader election, and presence protocols.
source_facts.license is Apache-2.0 and homepage is zookeeper.apache.org.
